DynamicPermission.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT 'ITSMSecurityIncidentSharedReporter' AS PermissionIdent FROM usr.ITSM_FolderTreeView as itsmFolTre WHERE itsmFolTre.FolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCompanyIdent AND itsmFolTre.IsShareAmongAuthors = @StateOne AND EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(@UserID, @FolderGroupSegmentIdent, @PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = itsmFolTre.FolderTreeIdent )

DataSource.SQL:
DECLARE @NewITSMSecurityIncident_Title_ITSM NVARCHAR(255) = usr.GetResourceText('NewITSMSecurityIncident_Title_ITSM', @UserLanguageID)
SELECT ISNULL(CAST(( SELECT CONCAT([ITSMKey] , ' ' , LEFT(itsReq.Subject, 20)) FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncident AS itsReq WHERE itsReq.ID = @ID ) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)), @NewITSMSecurityIncident_Title_ITSM) AS Title

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTypeCode AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTypeCodeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTypeCode AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTypeCodeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentUrgencyCategory AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentUrgencyCategorySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentUrgencyCategory AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentUrgencyCategorySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentImpactCategory AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentImpactCategorySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentImpactCategory AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentImpactCategorySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentPriorityLevel AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentPriorityLevelSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentPriorityLevel AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentPriorityLevelSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResponseProcedureType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResponseProcedureTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResponseProcedureType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResponseProcedureTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentClassificationType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentClassificationTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentClassificationType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentClassificationTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedUserCount AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedUserCountSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedUserCount AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedUserCountSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentRootCauseType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentRootCauseTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentRootCauseType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentRootCauseTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedInformationClass AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedInformationClassSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedInformationClass AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentAffectedInformationClassSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID, acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.FullName LIKE @ImmediateCorrectiveActionRequestorAccountID AND acc.[State] = @ActiveState ORDER BY acc.FullName ASC

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID, acc.[FullName] FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @ImmediateCorrectiveActionRequestorAccountID

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlStatus AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlStatusSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlStatus AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlStatusSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlPriority AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlPrioritySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlPriority AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentControlPrioritySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID, acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE acc.FullName LIKE @SecurityIncidentRequestorAccountID AND acc.[State] = @ActiveState ORDER BY acc.FullName ASC

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID, acc.[FullName] FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @SecurityIncidentRequestorAccountID

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentBreachVectorType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentBreachVectorTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentBreachVectorType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentBreachVectorTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentThreatActorType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentThreatActorTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentThreatActorType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentThreatActorTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentLogicalIntrusionType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentLogicalIntrusionTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentLogicalIntrusionType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentLogicalIntrusionTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentKeyBusinessImpactType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentKeyBusinessImpactTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentKeyBusinessImpactType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentKeyBusinessImpactTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentOutcomeType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentOutcomeTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentOutcomeType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentOutcomeTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTheftCategory AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTheftCategorySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTheftCategory AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentTheftCategorySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentFailureCategory AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentFailureCategorySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentFailureCategory AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentFailureCategorySetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

DataBind.SQL: SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResolutionMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResolutionMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResolutionMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncidentResolutionMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT gro.ID ,gro.[Name] FROM dbo.[Group] AS gro WHERE gro.ID = @AssignedGroupID
SELECT gro.ID ,gro.[Name] FROM dbo.[Group] AS gro WHERE gro.ID = @DialogAssignedGroupID
SELECT gro.ID ,gro.[Name] FROM dbo.[Group] AS gro WHERE gro.ID = @DialogAssignedToMyGroupID

DefaultDataSource.SQL: SELECT gro.ID AS AssignedGroupID FROM dbo.[Group] AS gro INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gra ON gra.GroupID = gro.ID AND gra.AccountID = @UserID WHERE gro.ID = @AssignedGroupID

EmptyDataBind.SQL: SELECT TOP(20) acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE gas.GroupID = @AssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

DataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE acc.FullName LIKE @AssignedAccountID AND gas.GroupID = @AssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @AssignedAccountID

DefaultDependencyDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE acc.ID = @AssignedAccountID AND gas.GroupID = @AssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

EmptyDataBind.SQL: SELECT TOP(20) acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE gas.GroupID = @DialogAssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

DataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE acc.FullName LIKE @DialogAssignedAccountID AND gas.GroupID = @DialogAssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @DialogAssignedAccountID

DefaultDependencyDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID ,acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc INNER JOIN dbo.GroupAccount AS gas ON gas.AccountID = acc.ID WHERE acc.ID = @DialogAssignedAccountID AND gas.GroupID = @DialogAssignedGroupID AND acc.[State] = @AccountActiveState

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT fot.Ident ,fol.[Name] FROM dbo.Folder AS fol INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fot ON fot.FolderID = fol.ID WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCompanyIdent

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCompanyIdent AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCompanyIdent WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCompanyIdent AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCompanyIdent WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
IF(@ReporterAccountID IS NULL OR @ReporterAccountID = @UserID)
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident
ELSE
SELECT itsmFolPer.FolderTreeIdent AS Ident ,itsmFolPer.FolderName AS [Name] FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@OperatorOnlyPermissionIDs) as itsmFolPer INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@ReporterAccountID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) as itsmFolPerReporter ON itsmFolPerReporter.FolderTreeID = itsmFolPer.FolderTreeID WHERE itsmFolPer.FolderLevel = @Level AND itsmFolPer.ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident AND itsmFolPer.FolderState = @FolderActiveState
UNION
SELECT fot.Ident, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fotP.ID = fot.ParentFolderTreeID AND fotP.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident WHERE fot.Ident = @ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderLevel = @Level AND ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident ) , 1 , 0 ) AS IsShowCategoryLevel3

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderLevel = @Level AND ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident ) , 1 , 0 ) AS IsShowCategoryLevel4

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor'), ('ITSMOperator');
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderLevel = @Level AND ParentFolderTreeIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident ) , 1 , 0 ) AS IsShowCategoryLevel5

DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
/*DECLARE @LastITSMCategoryIdent VARCHAR(900) = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)*/ DECLARE @LastITSMCategoryIdent VARCHAR(900) = @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident; IF @IsShowCategoryLevel3 = 1 SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident IF @IsShowCategoryLevel4 = 1 SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident IF @IsShowCategoryLevel5 = 1 SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = @ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident
IF @IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState IS NULL SET @LastITSMCategoryIdent = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)
IF @LastITSMCategoryIdent IS NULL
SELECT @IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState AS IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState
ELSE
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @LastITSMCategoryIdent ) OR ISNULL(@ID, 0) != 0 , 1, 0) AS IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState

SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

SELECT dialsetting.Guid ,dial.TextValue ,IIF(dialsetting.Guid = @ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid, 1, 0) AS Selected FROM usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC
SELECT @SolutionDescription AS SolutionDescription
SELECT @SolutionAditionalInformation AS SolutionAditionalInformation

SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMSolutionSuspendReason AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSolutionSuspendReasonSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

SELECT dialsetting.Guid ,dial.TextValue ,IIF(dialsetting.Guid = @ITSMSolutionSuspendReasonGuid, 1, 0) AS Selected FROM usr.ITSMSolutionSuspendReason AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSolutionSuspendReasonSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMApprovalSuspendReason AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMApprovalSuspendReasonSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

SELECT dialsetting.Guid ,dial.TextValue ,IIF(dialsetting.Guid = @ITSMApprovalSuspendReasonGuid, 1, 0) AS Selected FROM usr.ITSMApprovalSuspendReason AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMApprovalSuspendReasonSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

DataSource.SQL: SELECT CONCAT('', usr.GetResourceText(itsGwfs.TitleResourceKey, @UserLanguageID), '') AS [State] ,itsGrmt.[TextValue] AS ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid ,itsSsr.[TextValue] AS ITSMSolutionSuspendReasonGuid ,itsAsr.[TextValue] AS ITSMApprovalSuspendReasonGuid ,itsReq.ID ,itsReq.ITSMKey ,itsReq.Subject ,itsReqParent.ID AS ParentTableID ,itsReqParent.ITSMKey AS ParentITSMKey ,itsReqParent.Subject AS ParentSubject ,accCreator.FullName AS AccountID ,itsReq.CreateDate ,accLastUpdate.FullName AS LastUpdateAccountID ,itsReq.LastUpdate ,groAssigned.[Name] AS AssignedGroupID ,accAssigned.[FullName] AS AssignedAccountID FROM (VALUES (0)) AS dual(zero) LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncident AS itsReq ON itsReq.ID = @ID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_GetWorkFlowState ('ITSMSecurityIncidentWorkFlow') AS itsGwfs ON itsGwfs.[Value] = ISNULL(itsReq.[State], 1) LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncident AS itsReqParent ON itsReqParent.ID = itsReq.ParentTableID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS groAssigned ON groAssigned.ID = itsReq.AssignedGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accAssigned ON accAssigned.ID = itsReq.AssignedAccountID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accCreator ON accCreator.ID = ISNULL(itsReq.AccountID, @UserID) LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accLastUpdate ON accLastUpdate.ID = itsReq.LastUpdateAccountID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodType AS itsGrmt ON itsGrmt.Guid = itsReq.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid AND itsGrmt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSolutionSuspendReason AS itsSsr ON itsSsr.Guid = itsReq.ITSMSolutionSuspendReasonGuid AND itsSsr.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMApprovalSuspendReason AS itsAsr ON itsAsr.Guid = itsReq.ITSMApprovalSuspendReasonGuid AND itsAsr.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

DECLARE @ApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#4CAF50'; DECLARE @NotApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#ff7043';
SELECT CASE ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) WHEN 0 THEN @NotApprovedColor WHEN 1 THEN @ApprovedColor END AS BackgroundColor ,'#FFF' AS Color ,CASE WHEN itsApp.ApproverType = 'Group' THEN ISNULL(approverGro.[Name], '') WHEN itsApp.ApproverType = 'Account' THEN ISNULL(approverAcc.FullName, '') ELSE '' END AS Title FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS approverGro on approverGro.ID = itsApp.ApproverGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approverAcc on approverAcc.ID = itsApp.ApproverAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND itsApp.ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ApproveOrder ASC

SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) = 0, 0, 1)) AS Approved ,COUNT(*) AS Total FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS approverGro on approverGro.ID = itsApp.ApproverGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approverAcc on approverAcc.ID = itsApp.ApproverAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND itsApp.ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

DECLARE @ApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#4CAF50'; DECLARE @NotApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#ff7043';
SELECT CASE ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) WHEN 0 THEN @NotApprovedColor WHEN 1 THEN @ApprovedColor END AS BackgroundColor ,'#FFF' AS Color ,CASE WHEN itsApp.AssessmentType = 'Group' THEN ISNULL(AssessmentGro.[Name], '') WHEN itsApp.AssessmentType = 'Account' THEN ISNULL(AssessmentAcc.FullName, '') ELSE '' END AS Title FROM usr.ITSMAssessment AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS AssessmentGro on AssessmentGro.ID = itsApp.AssessmentGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS AssessmentAcc on AssessmentAcc.ID = itsApp.AssessmentAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY AssessmentOrder ASC

SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) = 0, 0, 1)) AS Approved ,COUNT(*) AS Total FROM usr.ITSMAssessment AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS AssessmentGro on AssessmentGro.ID = itsApp.AssessmentGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS AssessmentAcc on AssessmentAcc.ID = itsApp.AssessmentAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

SELECT CONCAT('', usr.GetResourceText(itsGwfs.SimpleModeTitleResourceKey, @UserLanguageID), '') AS [State] ,itsGrmt.[TextValue] AS ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid ,itsSsr.[TextValue] AS ITSMSolutionSuspendReasonGuid ,itsAsr.[TextValue] AS ITSMApprovalSuspendReasonGuid ,itsReq.ID ,itsReq.ITSMKey ,itsReq.Subject ,itsReqParent.ID AS ParentTableID ,itsReqParent.ITSMKey AS ParentITSMKey ,itsReqParent.Subject AS ParentSubject ,accCreator.FullName AS AccountID ,itsReq.CreateDate ,accLastUpdate.FullName AS LastUpdateAccountID ,itsReq.LastUpdate ,groAssigned.[Name] AS AssignedGroupID ,accAssigned.[FullName] AS AssignedAccountID FROM (VALUES (0)) AS dual(zero) LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncident AS itsReq ON itsReq.ID = @ID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_GetWorkFlowState ('ITSMSecurityIncidentWorkFlow') AS itsGwfs ON itsGwfs.[Value] = ISNULL(itsReq.[State], 1) LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncident AS itsReqParent ON itsReqParent.ID = itsReq.ParentTableID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS groAssigned ON groAssigned.ID = itsReq.AssignedGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accAssigned ON accAssigned.ID = itsReq.AssignedAccountID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accCreator ON accCreator.ID = ISNULL(itsReq.AccountID, @UserID) LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accLastUpdate ON accLastUpdate.ID = itsReq.LastUpdateAccountID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodType AS itsGrmt ON itsGrmt.Guid = itsReq.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid AND itsGrmt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSolutionSuspendReason AS itsSsr ON itsSsr.Guid = itsReq.ITSMSolutionSuspendReasonGuid AND itsSsr.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMApprovalSuspendReason AS itsAsr ON itsAsr.Guid = itsReq.ITSMApprovalSuspendReasonGuid AND itsAsr.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

DataBind.SQL: SELECT( SELECT mus.[Value] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID INNER JOIN usr.ITSMCategory AS itsCat ON itsCat.ID = fol.TableID INNER JOIN usr.ITSMOptionalField AS itsOpfSetting ON itsOpfSetting.ID = itsCat.ITSMOptionalFieldID INNER JOIN dbo.MultiSelect AS mus ON mus.TableID = itsOpfSetting.ID AND mus.FormIdent = 'ITSMOptionalField' AND ControlIdent = 'OptionalFieldIdent' WHERE fot.Ident = ISNULL(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident) FOR JSON PATH ) AS AdditionalFieldVisibility

EmptyDataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @LastFolderTreeIdent VARCHAR(900) = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @LastFolderTreeIdent ) BEGIN
INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor')
SELECT TOP(20) itsGaabftap.AccountID AS ID, itsGaabftap.AccountFullName AS FullName FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedAccountByFolderTreeAndPermission (@LastFolderTreeIdent, @PermissionIDs) AS itsGaabftap
END ELSE BEGIN
SELECT acc.ID, acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @UserID
END

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @LastFolderTreeIdent VARCHAR(900) = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @LastFolderTreeIdent ) BEGIN
INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor')
SELECT itsGaabftap.AccountID AS ID, itsGaabftap.AccountFullName AS FullName FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedAccountByFolderTreeAndPermission (@LastFolderTreeIdent, @PermissionIDs) AS itsGaabftap WHERE itsGaabftap.AccountFullName LIKE @ReporterAccountID
END ELSE BEGIN
SELECT acc.ID, acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @UserID
END

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT acc.ID, acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @ReporterAccountID

DefaultDependencyDataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @NewReporterAccountID INT
DECLARE @LastFolderTreeIdent VARCHAR(900) = COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermissionAndSegmentType(@UserID,@FolderGroupSegmentIdent,'ITSMSecurityIncidentSegment',@PermissionIDs) WHERE FolderTreeIdent = @LastFolderTreeIdent ) BEGIN
INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMAuthor')
SELECT @NewReporterAccountID = itsGaabftap.AccountID FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedAccountByFolderTreeAndPermission (@LastFolderTreeIdent, @PermissionIDs) AS itsGaabftap WHERE itsGaabftap.AccountID = @ReporterAccountID
END
IF @NewReporterAccountID IS NULL SELECT @NewReporterAccountID = @UserID
SELECT acc.ID, acc.FullName FROM dbo.Account AS acc WHERE acc.ID = @NewReporterAccountID

DataBind.SQL:
SELECT Email AS ReporterEmail FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID
INSERT INTO ##TmpTbl ([Message]) SELECT CONCAT('ReporterEmail - ReporterAccountID: ', @ReporterAccountID)

DefaultDataSource.SQL: SELECT Email AS ReporterEmail FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @UserID

DataBind.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(( SELECT Email FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID ), '') != ISNULL(@ReporterEmail, '') ,1,0) AS IsReporterEmailDifferent
SELECT Phone AS ReporterPhone FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID

DefaultDataSource.SQL: SELECT Phone AS ReporterPhone FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @UserID

DataBind.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(( SELECT Phone FROM dbo.Account WHERE ID = @ReporterAccountID ), '') != ISNULL(@ReporterPhone, '') ,1,0) AS IsReporterPhoneDifferent

SELECT dialsetting.Guid, dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != @DeletedState ORDER BY dial.OrderValue ASC

DefaultDataSource.SQL: SELECT [GUID] AS ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting WHERE FunctionalKey = 'user' AND [State] != @DeletedState

TimeLineDataBind.SQL: SET @Result = ( SELECT dial.TextValue FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodType AS dial INNER JOIN usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting AS dialsetting ON dialsetting.Guid = dial.Guid WHERE dial.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID AND dial.[State] != 0 AND CAST(dialsetting.Guid AS VARCHAR(MAX)) = @Value )

OtherSource.SQL: SELECT c.ID FROM dbo.Communication as c WHERE c.TableID = @ID AND c.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND c.ControlIdent = @ControlIdent

DataBind.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMSpecialist'), ('ITSMOperator'), ('ITSMAuthor');
SELECT itsm.SourceID AS ID ,CONCAT(itsm.ITSMKey,' - ',itsm.[Subject]) AS [ITSMTitle] FROM usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsm WHERE ( itsm.ITSMKey LIKE @ParentTableID OR itsm.[Subject] LIKE @ParentTableID ) AND itsm.SourceID != ISNULL(@ID, -1) AND itsm.SourceFormIdent = @SourceFormIdent AND itsm.LastFolderTreeIdent IN ( SELECT FolderTreeIdent FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedFolderTreeByAccountAndPermission(@UserID, @FolderGroupSegmentIdent, @PermissionIDs) )

SelectedDataBind.SQL: SELECT itsm.SourceID AS ID ,CONCAT(itsm.ITSMKey,' - ',itsm.[Subject]) AS [ITSMTitle] FROM usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsm WHERE itsm.SourceID = @ParentTableID AND itsm.SourceFormIdent = @SourceFormIdent

DataSource.SQL: DECLARE @ThisID_ITSM VARCHAR(255) = usr.GetResourceText('ThisID_ITSM', @UserLanguageID); SELECT itsmLinSbf.ID ,itsmLit.TextValue AS ITSMLinkTypeGuid ,IIF(itsmS.UniqueSourceIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent), usr.GetResourceText('ThisRecord_ITSM', @UserLanguageID), CONCAT('', itsmS.[ITSMKey], '') ) AS SourceUniqueIdent ,IIF(itsmT.UniqueSourceIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent), usr.GetResourceText('ThisRecord_ITSM', @UserLanguageID), CONCAT('', itsmT.[ITSMKey], '') ) AS TargetUniqueIdent FROM usr.ITSMLinkSubForm AS itsmLinSbf INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsmS ON itsmS.UniqueSourceIdent = itsmLinSbf.SourceUniqueIdent INNER JOIN usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsmT ON itsmT.UniqueSourceIdent = itsmLinSbf.TargetUniqueIdent INNER JOIN usr.ITSMLinkType AS itsmLit ON itsmLit.Guid = itsmLinSbf.ITSMLinkTypeGuid AND itsmLit.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID WHERE itsmLinSbf.[State] != @DeletedState AND (itsmLinSbf.SourceUniqueIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent) OR itsmLinSbf.TargetUniqueIdent = CONCAT(@ID, '#', @ThisFormIdent)) AND itsmLinSbf.FormIdent = @FormIdent

DECLARE @Group_ITSM VARCHAR(255) = usr.GetResourceText('Group_ITSM', @UserLanguageID);
SELECT itsmFfv.SourceID ,'ITSMSecurityIncident' AS FormIdent ,itsmFfv.ITSMKey ,itsmFfv.[Subject] ,fol.[Name] AS LastFolderTreeIdent FROM usr.ITSM_FormFullView AS itsmFfv INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fot ON fot.Ident = itsmFfv.LastFolderTreeIdent INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID WHERE itsmFfv.ParentTableID = @ID AND itsmFfv.SourceFormIdent = 'ITSMSecurityIncident' AND #PERMISSION[ITSMSecurityIncident(itsmFfv)]#

Section.HTMLTemplate:
[#BasicInformation_ITSM#]
[#QuickAnalysis_ITSM#]
[#SecurityIncidentClassification_ITSM#]
[#SecurityIncidentAnalysis_ITSM#]
[#SecurityIncidentImpact_ITSM#]
[#SecurityIncidentAffectedGroups_ITSM#]
[#SecurityIncidentImpact_ITSM#]
[#SecurityIncidentSecondAnalysis_ITSM#]
[#SecurityIncidentMeasure_ITSM#]
[#CSIRTTeam_ITSM#]
[#SERTTeam_ITSM#]
[#IncidentResolution_ITSM#]
[#IncidentClosure_ITSM#]
[#Communication_ITSM#]
[#ReporterInformation_ITSM#]
[#ReporterEmailDifferent_Information_ITSM#]
[#ReporterPhoneDifferent_Information_ITSM#]
[#RequestControl_ITSM#]

Condition.SQL: SELECT 1 AS ID WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(itsReq.ID) FROM @SelectedIDs AS selIDs INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncident AS itsReq ON itsReq.ID = selIDs.ID WHERE itsReq.[State] NOT IN ( @IncidentEvaluationState ,@SentToHDMZEState ,@SolutionValidationState ) ) > 0

SELECT 1 AS ID WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(itsReq.ID) FROM @SelectedIDs AS selIDs INNER JOIN usr.ITSMSecurityIncident AS itsReq ON itsReq.ID = selIDs.ID WHERE itsReq.[State] IN ( @ClosedState , @SolutionValidationState ) ) > 0

Section.HTMLTemplate: *
*
*
*
*

[#ITSMLinkSubForm_ITSM#]
[#ITSMStructure_ITSM#]
